text: Hello everyone, I hope everybody is good. I thought I would continue the career clarity tips and create a three-part series on career planning. I wanted to keep it honest, I wanted to keep it real, but also I wanted to keep it raw. Just so you can have those uncomfortable conversations with yourself, it's about time. 2026 is still quite long, so you really can make a difference in your life. Life has really been uncertain for a lot of us, and you know what better way than for me to create the series on how you can and stack yourself if that's if it's such a rid. So I get a lot of clients saying I feel stuck, I've been in the same space for quite a while, I don't know what to do, but honestly speaking you do, you just don't want to make those decisions, you just don't want to take that risk because the space that you're currently in is quite familiar, it's quite safe, so you rather not. But what I always say is as soon as you feel that you're comfortable in a space, that's the most dangerous and most riskiest place that you can be. You know that job is draining you, you know that environment or that space you've grown it, you know that environment is toxic for you, you know you want more, but more obviously feels riskier, but take the risk anyway because you staying in that space for a long time is also a risk on its own. So this series is really going to help you have those uncomfortable conversations, make those uncomfortable decisions for you to either pivot into a different space, transition into a new environment or career, or just grow as an individual and really harness your personal brand. So I'm hoping that I can help, I'm hoping that you follow and engage with the series because it's about to go down, it's about to get real. So see you on the next one looking forward to really making an impact in your life.
